name: enterprise-ims
description: Enterprise Inventory Management System - Multi-tenant ERP for retail, pharmacy, hospital & more

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.render:build:api: npm install --include=dev && npm run db:generate -w backend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.render:start:api: npm run db:migrate:deploy -w backend && npm run start -w backend
scripts.render:build:web: npm install --include=dev && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
